meta.summary: Fast disk-based k-mer counting and KMC database manipulation for FASTQ, FASTA, BAM, gzipped reads, and KFF/KMC outputs.
meta.description: Fast disk-based k-mer counting and KMC database manipulation for FASTQ, FASTA, BAM, gzipped reads, and KFF/KMC outputs.

test: kmc_tools 2>&1 | grep -F 'kmc_tools ver. 3.2.4' >/dev/null && kmc_dump 2>&1 | grep -F 'KMC dump ver. 3.2.4' >/dev/null

kmc_tools transform 2>&1 | grep -F 'Available operations:' >/dev/null && kmc_tools simple 2>&1 | grep -F 'set operation' >/dev/null && kmc_tools complex 2>&1 | grep -F 'more than 2 input' >/dev/null && kmc_tools filter 2>&1 | grep -F "The 'filter'" >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-kmc-count/tmp && cd /tmp/taf-kmc-count && printf '@r1
ACGTACGT
+
FFFFFFFF
@r2
ACGTTCGT
+
FFFFFFFF
' > reads.fq && kmc -k3 -m2 -ci1 -t1 reads.fq reads_k3 tmp >/tmp/taf-kmc-count.log 2>&1 && test -s reads_k3.kmc_pre && test -s reads_k3.kmc_suf && kmc_tools transform reads_k3 dump dump.txt >/tmp/taf-kmc-transform.log 2>&1 && grep -E '^ACG[[:space:]]+7$' dump.txt >/dev/null && kmc_dump reads_k3 dump2.txt >/tmp/taf-kmc-dump.log 2>&1 && grep -E '^ACG[[:space:]]+7$' dump2.txt >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-kmc-gzip/tmp && cd /tmp/taf-kmc-gzip && printf '@r1
ACGTACGT
+
FFFFFFFF
@r2
ACGTTCGT
+
FFFFFFFF
' > reads.fq && gzip -c reads.fq > reads.fq.gz && kmc -k3 -m2 -ci1 -t1 reads.fq.gz reads_gz tmp >/tmp/taf-kmc-gzip.log 2>&1 && test -s reads_gz.kmc_pre && test -s reads_gz.kmc_suf && kmc_tools transform reads_gz histogram hist.txt >/tmp/taf-kmc-hist.log 2>&1 && test -s hist.txt

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-kmc-simple/tmp && cd /tmp/taf-kmc-simple && printf '@a
ACGTACGT
+
FFFFFFFF
' > a.fq && printf '@b
ACGTAAAA
+
FFFFFFFF
' > b.fq && kmc -k3 -m2 -ci1 -t1 a.fq a tmp >/tmp/taf-kmc-a.log 2>&1 && kmc -k3 -m2 -ci1 -t1 b.fq b tmp >/tmp/taf-kmc-b.log 2>&1 && kmc_tools simple a b union ab_union >/tmp/taf-kmc-simple.log 2>&1 && test -s ab_union.kmc_pre && test -s ab_union.kmc_suf && kmc_tools transform ab_union dump union.txt >/tmp/taf-kmc-union.log 2>&1 && grep -F 'AAA' union.txt >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-kmc-filter/tmp && cd /tmp/taf-kmc-filter && printf '@a
ACGTACGT
+
FFFFFFFF
@b
TTTTTTTT
+
FFFFFFFF
' > reads.fq && kmc -k3 -m2 -ci1 -t1 reads.fq db tmp >/tmp/taf-kmc-filter-count.log 2>&1 && kmc_tools filter db reads.fq -ci1 filtered.fq >/tmp/taf-kmc-filter.log 2>&1 && test -s filtered.fq && grep -F '@a' filtered.fq >/dev/null

upstream.name: KMC
upstream.citation: Kokot et al. 2017; Deorowicz et al. 2015; Deorowicz et al. 2013
